profiles.source_notes: Sparse GPR table in instrumentos/flauta.py from externally sourced acoustic amplitude metadata; not a full measured spectrum.
limitations: Instrument density uses externally sourced sparse acoustic tables interpolated by GPR.
warnings: Instrument density uses externally sourced sparse acoustic tables interpolated by GPR.

profiles.source_notes: Coarse register/dynamic model; no externally sourced acoustic amplitude table.
limitations: Spectral density is a coarse fallback without external acoustic metadata.
warnings: Spectral density is a coarse fallback without external acoustic metadata.

profiles.source_notes: Scaled proxy from flute module (external acoustic metadata); not oboe-specific measured spectra.
limitations: Oboe density delegates to scaled flute GPR — coarse external-acoustic proxy.
warnings: Oboe density delegates to scaled flute GPR — coarse external-acoustic proxy.

profiles.source_notes: Percussion profile uses nominal pitch range when pitched; unpitched events need manual pitch metadata.
limitations: Percussion spectral density is a coarse proxy; unpitched strokes may lack pitch metadata.

unknown_instrument_fallback.source_notes: Unregistered instrument; generic coarse proxy applied.
limitations: Instrument not in registry; density uses generic coarse proxy.
warnings: Instrument not in registry; density uses generic coarse proxy.

disclaimer: Instrument registry audit. GPR-backed modules use externally sourced acoustic amplitude metadata (sparse tables, not runtime audio). Coarse profiles lack such tables. profile_status=empirical_profile requires documented source_notes.
